title: Cleanup

empty.browser: No browser caches detected on this Mac.
empty.ai: No AI or editor caches detected on this Mac.
empty.app: No app caches detected on this Mac.

dialog.title: Confirm Cleanup
dialog.subtitle: The following items will be permanently deleted:

chrome_ai_model.name: Chrome AI Model Cache
chrome_ai_model.safetyNote: Safe — On-device AI model auto-downloaded by Chrome. Does not affect browsing data, bookmarks, or accounts. Chrome re-downloads automatically when needed.

chrome_gpu_cache.name: Chrome GPU Cache
chrome_gpu_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Shader and GPU pipeline cache used to speed up rendering. Regenerated automatically on next Chrome launch.

arc_service_worker.name: Arc Service Worker Cache
arc_service_worker.safetyNote: Safe — Cached web app assets for offline support. Arc rebuilds these automatically when you next visit each site.

arc_gpu_cache.name: Arc GPU Cache
arc_gpu_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Shader and GPU pipeline cache. Regenerated automatically on next Arc launch.

brave_gpu_cache.name: Brave GPU Cache
brave_gpu_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Shader and GPU pipeline cache. Regenerated automatically on next Brave launch.

playwright_browsers.name: Playwright Browser Binaries
playwright_browsers.safetyNote: Safe — Test browser binaries downloaded by Playwright. Will be re-downloaded automatically when you next run Playwright tests.

claude_vm_bundles.name: Claude VM Bundles
claude_vm_bundles.safetyNote: Caution — Sandbox VM used by Claude Code for isolated worktree execution. Safe to delete, but Claude Code will re-download (~5 min) the first time isolated execution is used again.

claude_local_sessions.name: Claude Local Sessions
claude_local_sessions.safetyNote: Caution — Local session data for Claude. Deleting this removes cached session history but does not affect your Claude account or cloud data.

vscode_old_extensions.name: VS Code Old Extensions
vscode_old_extensions.safetyNote: Manual Review — Old extension versions flagged in VS Code's .obsolete file. Verify that newer versions are active before deleting. Cannot be recovered without manual reinstall.

vscode_orphaned_extensions.name: VS Code Orphaned Extensions
vscode_orphaned_extensions.safetyNote: Manual Review — Extension directories without a package.json. Likely corrupted or partially uninstalled. Verify they are not in use before deleting.

docker_build_cache.name: Docker Build Cache
docker_build_cache.safetyNote: Caution — Cached build layers from docker build commands. Safe to delete; layers will be rebuilt on next docker build (may slow initial builds).

docker_unused_images.name: Docker Unused Images
docker_unused_images.safetyNote: Caution — Docker images not referenced by any container. Active containers and their images are not affected. Re-pull from registry if needed.

pyinstaller_cache.name: PyInstaller Cache
pyinstaller_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Build cache for PyInstaller. Regenerated automatically on next PyInstaller build.

uv_cache.name: uv Package Cache
uv_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Package download cache for the uv Python package manager. Re-downloaded automatically on next install.

nordvpn_cache.name: NordVPN Cache
nordvpn_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Temporary cache files for NordVPN. Regenerated automatically on next NordVPN launch.

node_gyp_cache.name: node-gyp Cache
node_gyp_cache.safetyNote: Safe — Native addon build cache for Node.js. Regenerated automatically on next npm install that builds native modules.

dockerNotRunning: Docker is not running. Start Docker to enable this cleanup.
